title: helichrysum rupestre subsp. pendulum
intro: Helichrysum rupestre subsp. pendulum, also known as mountain strawflower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa and is valued for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Helichrysum rupestre subsp. pendulum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and stress, and promote overall well-being.
